name: add_oauth_nextjs
brief_template:
To add OAuth to this Next.js App Router project:
1. Check src/lib/auth.ts for existing auth provider setup
2. Check src/middleware.ts for route protection
3. Check prisma/schema.prisma for user/session tables
4. Add callback route at src/app/api/auth/callback/route.ts
5. Add login UI at src/app/login/page.tsx
6. Verify env vars in src/env.ts or .env.local
